articles.description: AVFoundation is Apple’s advanced framework for working with time-based media, such as audio and video. This course covers the essentials to using the AVFoundation framework to create audio based apps. You’ll learn how to set up audio sessions; record and playback audio; audio metering, how to control volume and rate; special effects, such as pitch and reverb; and generating speech from text.
